title: pleiospilos × purpusii
intro: Pleiospilos × purpusii, also known as the Living Rock or Split Rock, is a unique succulent plant that is a hybrid of Pleiospilos compactus and Conophytum truncatum, characterized by its ability to photosynthesize and grow on rocks. The plant is said to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pleiospilos × purpusii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and crushed into a powder, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or topical applications, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
